summary_of_findings: Our analysis of TATA TECHNOLOGIES LIMITED reveals high risk overall, elevated stakeholder perception plus critical public documentation concerns appearing in public databases. The review also identified serious sovereign interest presence and prominent embargoed country exposure threatening international operations. The risk assessment also detected concerning political affiliation management raising questions about decision independence. Additional assessment reveals our analysis reveals moderate risk in cyber resilience capabilities. The identified concerns warrant extensive controls and enhanced monitoring protocols.
sanctions_summary: There are 3 potential sanctions findings within the corporate group.
anti_summary: No notable Bribery, Corruption, or Fraud findings for this entity.
gov_summary: Group / Global Ultimate Owner not found to be state-controlled

There are 2 PEP findings for the individuals associated with this entity. Some of the most recent PEP events include:
- Mr Ajoyendra Mukherjee: Potential Political Exposure Findings
- Ms Usha Sangwan: Potential Political Exposure Findings
adv_summary: There are other potential news findings.
additional_indicators_summary: There are notable findings in cybersecurity screening/profiling for this entity.
ral_summary: No legal or regulatory findings available.

adv_data.kpi_details:
Name: TATA TECHNOLOGIES LIMITED
Rating: 4.4
Number of Reviews: 1880


Reviews:
	1. Name: Dipak Shinde | Rating: 4
Employee has talent but it's semi goverment type work culture so you can understand more from it. Work life balance is very good. Economical growth is very low.

	2. Name: Yash G | Rating: 1
One of the worst companies you can work in I had interviewed here I had done all 3 rounds and they were gone very well with positive feedback but after this the when I called the HR there was no response. They just ghosted me even when I tried to call to HR they didn't pick up the call and wouldn't give me a update. After 2 weeks I gave up tried to follow up and after 1 month the HR calls me again to see if I'm interested and then ghosts me again🙂. If you didn't want to hire why did you waste my time and also how much time does one have to take to give a small update. One of the worst companies I have ever encountered wouldn't recommend to anyone

	3. Name: ateet | Rating: 4
Went for session on compliance for Vendors.
Had a great experience, people were cooperative.

	4. Name: Steven Macwan | Rating: 5
That is really good campus.  Parking and food is free. Breakfast,  lunch and snacks are available. Campus is spacious

	5. Name: chetan ambi | Rating: 5
Serves very good quality food without any charges.good atmosphere
